name: Procurement SOP
description: Standard procurement inquiry and PO lookup procedure
body: # Procurement SOP | 1) Confirm vendor context. 2) Use PO tools for live status. 3) Escalate blocked POs to the buyer of record.

name: Invoice reconciliation
description: Finance invoice matching and discrepancy handling
body: # Invoice reconciliation | 1) Match invoice lines to PO receipts. 2) Flag amount or tax mismatches. 3) Prefer tool-backed figures.
